pipelineSteps.label: Outcome routing
pipelineSteps.summary: The typed router intentionally kept this request on the conversation surface.

pipelineSteps.label: Planner
pipelineSteps.summary: Studio locked the shared execution plan before handing the request to the non-artifact lane.

pipelineSteps.label: Shared execution
pipelineSteps.summary: The shared execution envelope recorded worker receipts without pretending an artifact renderer ran.
pipelineSteps.verificationGate: Shared execution receipts must remain truthful about the active outcome surface.

pipelineSteps.label: Verification
pipelineSteps.summary: Studio verified the selected non-artifact route before composing the reply state.
pipelineSteps.verificationGate: Verification state, not worker prose, authorizes Studio replies.

pipelineSteps.label: Reply
pipelineSteps.summary: Studio keeps the user-facing reply truthful to the chosen surface without implying an artifact renderer ran.
